arguments.content:
# Technical Debt Tracking Document

**Document Created:** March 24, 2026  
**Team:** Orion Tech Backend Team  
**Review Cycle:** Weekly

---

## Overview

This document tracks technical debt items identified during Sprint 8 and the week of March 17-24, 2026. Items are prioritized based on impact and urgency.

---

## High Priority

| # | Title | Discovered At | Estimated Effort | Description |
|---|-------|---------------|------------------|-------------|
| 1 | Timezone Inconsistency in CI Reports | 2026-03-20 | 2 days | Build reports and benchmark results use mixed timezones (UTC, local, +08:00). Standardization required across all CI artifacts. |
| 2 | Empty Time Field Validation Gap | 2026-03-21 | 1 day | P1 requirement violations - empty `time` fields in JSON reports. Need automated validation at generation time. |
| 3 | Legacy API v1 Endpoints | 2026-03-23 | 3 weeks | v1 endpoints contain deprecated code patterns and security vulnerabilities. Scheduled for deprecation by June 30, 2026. |

---

## Medium Priority

| # | Title | Discovered At | Estimated Effort | Description |
|---|-------|---------------|------------------|-------------|
| 4 | File Naming Standard Violations | 2026-03-20 | 3 days | Historical reports use inconsistent naming patterns. 45% of legacy files still need migration to `YYYYMMDD_description.ext` format. |
| 5 | Missing Rate Limiting on v2.2 | 2026-03-23 | 1 week | Current v2.2 endpoints lack proper rate limiting. New middleware needs backporting to prevent abuse. |
| 6 | OAuth2 Token Storage | 2026-03-23 | 4 days | JWT token revocation list not implemented. Need Redis-based token blacklist for logout/security scenarios. |

---

## Low Priority

| # | Title | Discovered At | Estimated Effort | Description |
|---|-------|---------------|------------------|-------------|
| 7 | Documentation Gaps | 2026-03-22 | 2 days | Internal wiki lacks JSON schema standards page. Need to document naming conventions and validation rules. |
| 8 | SDK Version Alignment | 2026-03-23 | 1 week | Python and JavaScript SDKs are on v2.1. Need updates to support v2.3 features (OAuth2, new endpoints). |
| 9 | Benchmark Test Coverage | 2026-03-21 | 3 days | Only 60% of API endpoints have performance benchmarks. Need to expand coverage for remaining endpoints. |

---

## Debt Metrics

| Priority | Count | Total Effort | Target Resolution |
|----------|-------|--------------|-------------------|
| High | 3 | ~4 weeks | Sprint 8-9 |
| Medium | 3 | ~2 weeks | Sprint 9-10 |
| Low | 3 | ~2 weeks | Sprint 10-11 |

---

## Action Items

| Debt Item | Owner | Target Date | Status |
|-----------|-------|-------------|--------|
| Timezone Inconsistency | Mike | March 28, 2026 | In Progress |
| Empty Time Field Validation | Sarah | March 27, 2026 | Pending |
| Legacy API v1 Deprecation | Team | June 30, 2026 | Planned |
| File Naming Migration | Tom | April 15, 2026 | In Progress |
| Rate Limiting Backport | Mike | April 7, 2026 | Pending |

---

## Notes

- High priority items should be addressed before v2.3 release
- Medium priority items can be parallelized with Sprint 8 feature work
- Low priority items scheduled for Q2 technical debt sprint
- Weekly review scheduled every Wednesday

---

**Last Updated:** March 24, 2026  
**Next Review:** March 31, 2026
